items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا عَمْرُو بْنُ عَلِيٍّ وَحُمَيْدُ بْنُ مَسْعَدَةَ عَنْ يَزِيدَ وَهُوَ ابْنُ زُرَيْعٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي شُعْبَةُ عَنْ مَالِكِ بْنِ عُرْفُطَةَ عَنْ عَبْدِ خَيْرٍ قَالَشَهِدْتُ عَلِيًّا دَعَا بِكُرْسِيٍّ فَقَعَدَ عَلَيْهِ ثُمَّ دَعَا بِمَاءٍ فِي تَوْرٍ فَغَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ مَضْمَضَ وَاسْتَنْشَقَ بِكَفٍّ وَاحِدٍ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ غَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثًا وَيَدَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ غَمَسَ يَدَهُ فِي الْإِنَاءِ فَمَسَحَ بِرَأْسِهِ ثُمَّ غَسَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ قَالَ مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يَنْظُرَ إِلَى وُضُوءِ رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَهَذَا وُضُوءُهُ
items.id: Having reported to us [Amru bin Ali] and [Humaid bin Mas'adah] from [Yazid namely Ibn Zura'i] he said; told me [Syu'bah] from [Malik bin 'Urfuthah] from [Abdi Khair], he said, "I saw [Ali] ask for a chair, and he sat down. Then he asked for water in a small vessel. He then washed his hands, gargled three times and sucked the water into the nose with one palm three times, washed his face three times, washed both hands three times-three times, then dipped his hands into the vessel and rubbed his head once. He also washed both feet each three times. After that he said, 'Whoever likes to see the way the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam performs ablution, this is the way he sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam performs ablution."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الْمِقْسَمِيُّ قَالَ أَنْبَأَنَا حَجَّاجٌ قَالَ قَالَ ابْنُ جُرَيْجٍ حَدَّثَنِي شَيْبَةُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدَ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ أَخْبَرَهُ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي أَبِي عَلِيٌّ أَنَّ الْحُسَيْنَ بْنَ عَلِيٍّ قَالَدَعَانِي أَبِي عَلِيٌّ بِوَضُوءٍ فَقَرَّبْتُهُ لَهُ فَبَدَأَ فَغَسَلَ كَفَّيْهِ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُدْخِلَهُمَا فِي وَضُوئِهِ ثُمَّ مَضْمَضَ ثَلَاثًا وَاسْتَنْثَرَ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ غَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثَ مَرَّاتٍ ثُمَّ غَسَلَ يَدَهُ الْيُمْنَى إِلَى الْمِرْفَقِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ الْيُسْرَى كَذَلِكَ ثُمَّ مَسَحَ ب��رَأْسِهِ مَسْحَةً وَاحِدَةً ثُمَّ غَسَلَ رِجْلَهُ الْيُمْنَى إِلَى الْكَعْبَيْنِ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ الْيُسْرَى كَذَلِكَ ثُمَّ قَامَ قَائِمًا فَقَالَ نَاوِلْنِي فَنَاوَلْتُهُ الْإِنَاءَ الَّذِي فِيهِ فَضْلُ وَضُوئِهِ فَشَرِبَ مِنْ فَضْلِ وَضُوئِهِ قَائِمًا فَعَجِبْتُ فَلَمَّا رَآنِي قَالَ لَا تَعْجَبْ فَإِنِّي رَأَيْتُ أَبَاكَ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَصْنَعُ مِثْلَ مَا رَأَيْتَنِي صَنَعْتُ يَقُولُ لِوُضُوئِهِ هَذَا وَشُرْبِ فَضْلِ وَضُوئِهِ قَائِمًا
items.id: Having informed us [Ibrahim bin Hasan Al Miqsami] he said; Having reported to us [Hajjaj] he said; [Ibn Juraij] said; has told me [Shaibah] that [Muhammad bin Ali] Has told him he said; My father ([Ali]) had informed me that [Husain bin Ali], said, "My father ([Ali]) asked me for ablution water, so I brought it to him. Then he began to wash the palms of his hands three times - before starting his ablution -, rinsed his mouth three times and inhaled the water into his nose and then expelled it, then washed his face three times, washed his right hand up to the elbow three times, washed his left hand three times, wiped his head once, then washed his right foot up to the ankle three times and his left foot three times. After that he stood up and said, 'Take this.' perform ablution and drink the remaining water from the ablution while standing.

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا قُتَيْبَةُ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو الْأَحْوَصِ عَنْ أَبِي إِسْحَقَ عَنْ أَبِي حَيَّةَ وَهُوَ ابْنُ قَيْسٍ قَالَرَأَيْتُ عَلِيًّا رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ تَوَضَّأَ فَغَسَلَ كَفَّيْهِ حَتَّى أَنْقَاهُمَا ثُمَّ تَمَضْمَضَ ثَلَاثًا وَاسْتَنْشَقَ ثَلَاثًا وَغَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثًا وَغَسَلَ ذِرَاعَيْهِ ثَلَاثًا ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ مَسَحَ بِرَأْسِهِ ثُمَّ غَسَلَ قَدَمَيْهِ إِلَى الْكَعْبَيْنِ ثُمَّ قَامَ فَأَخَذَ فَضْلَ طَهُورِهِ فَشَرِبَ وَهُوَ قَائِمٌ ثُمَّ قَالَ أَحْبَبْتُ أَنْ أُرِيَكُمْ كَيْفَ طُهُورُ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ
items.id: Having informed us [Qutaibah bin Sa'id] he said; has told us [Abu Al Ahwash] from [Abu Ishaq] from [Abu Hayyah i.e. Ibn Qais] he said; "I saw [Ali] Radliyallahu'anhu perform ablution; he washed the palms of his hands until he had washed them, then rinsed his mouth three times and put water into his nose three times, then washed his face three times and washed his two arms three times-three times, then wiped his head, then he washed the soles of his feet up to his ankles. After that he stood up and took the rest of his ablution, and drank it while standing. He then said, 'I am happy to show you how to do ablution. Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam to you."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سَلَمَةَ وَالْحَارِثُ بْنُ مِسْكِينٍ قِرَاءَةً عَلَيْهِ وَأَنَا أَسْمَعُ وَاللَّفْظُ لَهُ عَنْ ابْنِ الْقَاسِمِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي مَالِكٌ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ يَحْيَى الْمَازِنِيِّ عَنْ أَبِيهِأَنَّهُ قَالَ لِعَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ زَيْدِ بْنِ عَاصِمٍ وَكَانَ مِنْ أَصْحَابِ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَهُوَ جَدُّ عَمْرِو بْنِ يَحْيَى هَلْ تَسْتَطِيعُ أَنْ تُرِيَنِي كَيْفَ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَتَوَضَّأُ قَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ زَيْدٍ نَعَمْ فَدَعَا بِوَضُوءٍ فَأَفْرَغَ عَلَى يَدَيْهِ فَغَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ مَرَّتَيْنِ مَرَّتَيْنِ ثُمَّ تَمَضْمَضَ وَاسْتَنْشَقَ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ غَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ غَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ مَرَّتَيْنِ مَرَّتَيْنِ إِلَى الْمِرْفَقَيْنِ ثُمَّ مَسَحَ رَأْسَهُ بِيَدَيْهِ فَأَقْبَلَ بِهِمَا وَأَدْبَرَ بَدَأَ بِمُقَدَّمِ رَأْسِهِ ثُمَّ ذَهَبَ بِهِمَا إِلَى قَفَاهُ ثُمَّ رَدَّهُمَا حَتَّى رَجَعَ إِلَى الْمَكَانِ الَّذِي بَدَأَ مِنْهُ ثُمَّ غَسَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ
items.id: Has preached to us [Muhammad bin Salamah] and [Al Harith bin Miskin] has been read to him and I heard the pronunciation from him, from [Ibnu Qasim] he said; has told me [Malik] from ['Amru bin Yahya Al Mazini] from [his father] that he said to [Abdullah bin Zaid bin 'Ashim] - a friend of Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam, and his grandfather Amru bin Yahya -, "Can you show me how Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam performs ablution?" Abdullah bin Zaid said, "Yes." Then he asked for water for ablution, then poured water over his hands and washed them twice or twice. Then rinse his mouth and put water into his nose three times, wash his face three times, wash his hands twice up to his elbows, rub his head with both hands. He ran his hands forward and then back, starting from the top of his head then pulling back to the nape of his neck, then returning them to their original place, then washed his feet."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا عُتْبَةُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مَالِكٍ هُوَ ابْنُ أَنَسٍ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَبِيهِ أَنَّهُ قَالَ لِعَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ زَيْدِ بْنِ عَاصِمٍ وَهُوَ جَدُّ عَمْرِو بْنِ يَحْيَىهَلْ تَسْتَطِيعُ أَنْ تُرِيَنِي كَيْفَ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَتَوَضَّأُ قَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ زَيْدٍ نَعَمْ فَدَعَا بِوَضُوءٍ فَأَفْرَغَ عَلَى يَدِهِ الْيُمْنَى فَغَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ مَرَّتَيْنِ ثُمَّ مَضْمَضَ وَاسْتَنْشَقَ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ غَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ غَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ مَرَّتَيْنِ مَرَّتَيْنِ إِلَى الْمِرْفَقَيْنِ ثُمَّ مَسَحَ رَأْسَهُ بِيَدَيْهِ فَأَقْبَلَ بِهِمَا وَأَدْبَرَ بَدَأَ بِمُقَدَّمِ رَأْسِهِ ثُمَّ ذَهَبَ بِهِمَا إِلَى قَفَاهُ ثُمَّ رَدَّهُمَا حَتَّى رَجَعَ إِلَى الْمَكَانِ الَّذِي بَدَأَ مِنْهُ ثُمَّ غَسَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ
items.id: It has been reported to us ['Utbah bin Abdullah] from [Malik, namely Ibn Anas] from [Amr bin Yahya] from [his father], that he once said to [Abdullah bin Zaid bin Ashim] - Amru bin Yahya's grandfather -, "Can you show me how the Prophet sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam performs ablution?" Abdullah bin Zaid said, "Yes." Then he asked for ablution water. He poured it into his hands and washed them twice, then rinsed his mouth and put the water in his nose three times. Then he washed his face three times, washed his hands twice up to his elbows, rubbed his head back, starting from the tip of his head, then pulled back to the nape of his neck, then returned it to its original place. After that, wash his feet."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مَنْصُورٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ زَيْدٍ الَّذِي أُرِيَ النِّدَاءَ قَالَرَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ تَوَضَّأَ فَغَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ ثَلَاثًا وَيَدَيْهِ مَرَّتَيْنِ وَغَسَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ مَرَّتَيْنِ وَمَسَحَ بِرَأْسِهِ مَرَّتَيْنِ
items.id: Has informed us [Muhammad bin Mansur] he said; has told us [Sufyan] from [Amr bin Yahya] from [his father] from [Abdullah bin Zaid] he said; "I saw the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam performing ablution, so he washed his face three times, his hands twice, his feet twice and wiped his head twice."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا الْحُسَيْنُ بْنُ حُرَيْثٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا الْفَضْلُ بْنُ مُوسَى عَنْ جُعَيْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي عَبْدُ الْمَلِكِ بْنُ مَرْوَانَ بْنِ الْحَارِثِ بْنِ أَبِي ذُنَابٍ قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ سَالِمٌ سَبَلَانُ قَالَوَكَانَتْ عَائِشَةُ تَسْتَعْجِبُ بِأَمَانَتِهِ وَتَسْتَأْجِرُهُ فَأَرَتْنِي كَيْفَ كَانَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ يَتَوَضَّأُ فَتَمَضْمَضَتْ وَاسْتَنْثَرَتْ ثَلَاثًا وَغَسَلَتْ وَجْهَهَا ثَلَاثًا ثُمَّ غَسَلَتْ يَدَهَا الْيُمْنَى ثَلَاثًا وَالْيُسْرَى ثَلَاثًا وَوَضَعَتْ يَدَهَا فِي مُقَدَّمِ رَأْسِهَا ثُمَّ مَسَحَتْ رَأْسَهَا مَسْحَةً وَاحِدَةً إِلَى مُؤَخِّرِهِ ثُمَّ أَمَرَّتْ يَدَهَا بِأُذُنَيْهَا ثُمَّ مَرَّتْ عَلَى الْخَدَّيْنِقَالَ سَالِمٌ كُنْتُ آتِيهَا مُكَاتَبًا مَا تَخْتَفِي مِنِّي فَتَجْلِسُ بَيْنَ يَدَيَّ وَتَتَحَدَّثُ مَعِي حَتَّى جِئْتُهَا ذَاتَ يَوْمٍ فَقُلْتُ ادْعِي لِي بِالْبَرَكَةِ يَا أُمَّ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ قَالَتْ وَمَا ذَاكَ قُلْتُ أَعْتَقَنِي اللَّهُ قَالَتْ بَارَكَ اللَّهُ لَكَ وَأَرْخَتْ الْحِجَابَ دُونِي فَلَمْ أَرَهَا بَعْدَ ذَلِكَ الْيَوْمِ
items.id: Has informed us [Al Husain bin Huraits] he said; has told us [Fadhlu bin Musa] from [Ju'aid bin Abdurrahman] he said; Having reported to me [Abdul Malik bin Marwan bin Al Harith bin Abu Dzunab] he said; Having informed me [Abu Abdullah Salim Sabalan] he said; "[Aisyah] was very impressed with his trustworthy nature and she hired him. Then Aisyah showed me how Rasulullah shallallahu 'alaihi wasallam performed ablution; he gargled and inhaled water into his nose and expelled it three times, washed his face three times, washed his right hand three times and his left hand three times, then put his hand on the front of his head and rubbed it in one stroke to the back. Then he ran (wiped) his hands over both ears and both cheeks." Salim said; "I once came to 'Aisyah while she was still mukatab (a slave who was promised to be freed with payment in installments). So that nothing was hidden from me. She sat in front of me and chatted with me. One day I said, 'O ummul believers, pray for me with blessings!' bless you'. She immediately covered the hijab in front of me and after that I never saw her again."

items.arab: أَخْبَرَنَا الْهَيْثَمُ بْنُ أَيُّوبَ الطَّالَقَانِيُّ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا زَيْدُ بْنُ أَسْلَمَ عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ عَنْ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ قَالَرَأَيْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ تَوَضَّأَ فَغَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ ثُمَّ تَمَضْمَضَ وَاسْتَنْشَقَ مِنْ غَرْفَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ وَغَسَلَ وَجْهَهُ وَغَسَلَ يَدَيْهِ مَرَّةً مَرَّةً وَمَسَحَ بِرَأْسِهِ وَأُذُنَيْهِ مَرَّةًقَالَ عَبْدُ الْعَزِيزِ وَأَخْبَرَنِي مَنْ سَمِعَ ابْنَ عَجْلَانَ يَقُولُ فِي ذَلِكَ وَغَسَلَ رِجْلَيْهِ
items.id: Having reported to us [Al Haitsam bin Ayyub At Thalaqani] he said; has told us [Abdul 'Aziz bin Muhammad] he said; has told us [Zaid bin Aslam] from [Atha bin Yasar] from [Ibn 'Abbas], he said; "I saw the Messenger of Allah sallallaahu 'alaihi wasallam performing ablution. He washed his hands, then rinsed his mouth and put water into his nose from one cup (taking water from the palms of his hands) and washed his face and hands once in a while. Then wiped his head and both ears once." [Abdul 'Aziz] said; [The person] who heard from [Ibn 'Ajlan] reported to me, he said in this hadith; 'He washed his feet'."
